title: [DR] Disc Rarities
description: This pack adds rarities (common, uncommon, rare, epic) and obtainment methods (chests, mobs, etc.) to music discs' names!
body:
**This pack makes some changes for music discs, see below!**

# ✨ Changes (open spoilers)

<details>
<summary>Adds rarities and obtainment methods to disc names</summary>

![New Disc Names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04e13929bd8f011e8c80018655008cb6f1cb54a9.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Adds a little rarity texture to discs</summary>
Red = Common, Yellow = Uncommon, Blue = Rare, Epic = Purple.

![Rarity Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f35ae962cd5fd463b368f30078b8ab2ab9288b55.png)
</details>

# 🔩 Supports:
- 1.21.9-1.21.11
- Would NOT work if another resource pack that changes **the disc textures and names** is ABOVE this pack on the pack list.

# 🎈 More Info:

<details>
<summary>🧰 Updates</summary>
We will update the pack 1-4 days after a new Minecraft version comes out.
</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙ Installation</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hZZ3U417VOI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Altering, Customizing, and Uploading the Pack</summary>
You can change assets inside the pack, but you cannot upload it anywhere (Modrinth, Curseforge, Social Media, etc.). Use it for yourself and the people you know. If you want to create addons/extensions for my packs, please delete all the assets I made, then upload your own anywhere you'd like.
</details>
